notes: Fresh from-scratch rerun chosen from a non-live lineage with stronger ecological object surfaces than the current live edition.
Public bindings are pulled from Nick's saved YouTube notes and collections rather than newly researched filler URLs.
Every bound source already has a native YouTube thumbnail, avoiding page screenshot previews.
Verified locally and remotely: 8 artifact hotspots render, hover opens the signal-tuning video preview, and click pin-opens an in-scene iframe player.
Added geometry-tethered hover origins so the preview sits inside the cabinet face instead of drifting far left.
Taste note: the video treatment is still visibly YouTube-branded, but placement now reads cabinet-native enough to pass.
